lint.command: uv run black --check mtb/ tests/ scripts/

blockingIssues.description: Old CSV fallback behavior is incorrect: README quality cell formatting prioritizes weighted_pct even when weighted scoring drops unknown legacy problem IDs, yielding misleading primary quality output instead of required flat-pass-rate fallback.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten validation of required skill commands so handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure cannot be marked true when required verification commands are missing from evidence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: weighted-scoring-module review noted python-worker requires tests/test_quality_benchmarks.py, but handoff marked followedProcedure=true without that command in verification.

rejectedObservations.observation: Shared architecture documentation appears stale on scoring semantics versus current tier-weighted implementation.
